item.title: Nutritionist / Quality Control (Offshore) at Castel Resources Consultancy Limited
item.description: Castel Resources Consultancy Limited is recruiting to fill the position of: Nutritionist / Quality Control (Offshore). The position is located in Port Harcourt, Rivers State. Interested candidates should possess a Degree in Nutrition/Food Science.

item.title: Ibadan Business School Limited Job Recruitment (5 Positions)
item.description: Ibadan Business School Limited is recruiting suitable candidates. The position is located in Abia State.

item.title: Senior Backend Engineer at Example Limited
item.description: Example Limited is recruiting to fill the position of: Senior Backend Engineer. The position is located in Enugu State.

item.title: Customer Acquisition Agent at Lifebank
item.description: Lifebank is recruiting to fill the position of: Customer Acquisition Agent. The position is located in Onipanu, Lagos State.
